title: Spicy Paneer Energy Balls
description: A healthy Indian-inspired snack made with paneer and spices, perfect for a quick energy boost.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine spicy paneer, whole wheat flour, ginger powder, cumin powder, red chili powder, and salt.
Add ghee or oil to the mixture and mix well.
Knead the mixture until it forms a dough.
Make small balls from the dough, about 1-inch in diameter.
Place the energy balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Let the energy balls cool completely before serving.
